{"query":"2026 NBA Finals consecutive unique champions streak since 2019 eight different winners","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1310,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_NBA_Finals","title":"2026 NBA Finals - Wikipedia","content":"It was the NBA's eighth consecutive year with a unique champion, the longest such stretch in league history.
The teams had met in the championship of the 2025 NBA Cup, which New York won, 124–113.
Brunson led the Knicks to the second round in 2023 and 2024, and to the Eastern Conference Finals in 2025, where they lost to the Indiana Pacers.
Under the first season with head coach Brown, the New York Knicks finished with a 53–29 record, their highest win total since 2012–13.
As the two-seed in the Western Conference playoffs, they defeated the Portland Trail Blazers in five games in the first round and the Minnesota Timberwolves in the Western Conference semifinals in six games.
Barnes won a championship with the Golden State Warriors in 2015 and made another appearance in 2016, Kornet won a championship with the Boston Celtics in 2024, and Olynyk reached the 2020 Finals with the Miami Heat.
Defeated the 6th-seeded Atlanta Hawks, 4–2 — First round — Defeated the 7th-seeded Portland Trail Blazers, 4–1
New York broke their own franchise record for the largest postseason comeback and tying the 2025 champion Oklahoma City Thunder for the second-largest comeback in playoff history.
They were the first New York City-based team to win a championship in one of the top four North American sports leagues since the New York Giants won Super Bowl XLVI in 2012.
"The 2026 NBA Finals prove historically clutch as Knicks win 3rd championship".
"NBA Finals Game 1 delivers biggest audience since 2019"."},{"url":"https://pr.nba.com/2026-nba-finals-game-notes/","title":"2026 NBA Finals Game Notes - NBA.com: NBA Communications","content":"Their 53-year gap between championships is the longest in NBA history.
The previous longest gap was the Milwaukee Bucks’ 50-year gap from 1971 to 2021.
It also marked the second consecutive NBA Finals to feature such a shot, after Tyrese Haliburton’s Game 1 winner in 2025.
The 2000-01 Lakers hold the NBA record with eight consecutive road victories."},{"url":"https://sports.yahoo.com/articles/no-dynasties-the-nbas-incredible-streak-continues-115943312.html","title":"No dynasties: The NBA's incredible streak continues - Yahoo Sports","content":"With Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs eliminating the defending champion Thunder in a thrilling Game 7 on Saturday night, it's now official: The NBA will crown a different champion for the eighth straight season, extending the longest streak in league history.
Getting over the hump: For seven straight seasons (2018-2025), the Canes were good enough to win a playoff series but not great enough to reach the championship round — the longest such streak in North American major sports history.
They've authored a much different story in 2026, replacing years of playoff anguish with a postseason stroll.
For the first time since 2016, a new men's and women's champion will be crowned in the same year."},{"url":"https://www.nba.com/watch/video/2026-nba-finals-history-is-calling","title":"2026 NBA Finals | History Is Calling","content":"NBA.comhttps://www.nba.com · Jun 3, 2026NBA.comhttps://www.nba.com · Jun 3, 2026The Knicks defeated the Spurs, 94-90, as they win the series, 4-1, and claim their first NBA Championship in 53 years."}]}

This extends the longest streak of unique champions in league history","score":0.7159213,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_NBA_Finals","title":"2026 NBA Finals","content":"# 2026 NBA Finals. The **2026 NBA Finals** was the championship series of the National Basketball Association's (NBA) 2025–26 season and conclusion to the season's playoffs. It was the Knicks' third NBA championship, and their first since 1973. The series ran from June 3 to June 13, 2026. The series was a rematch of the 1999 NBA Finals, which the Spurs won in five games, and of the 2025 NBA Cup championship game, which the Knicks won 124–113. New York won the first two games, a first in the Finals for the team. In Game 4, the Knicks rallied from 29 points down in the third quarter, and OG Anunoby won the game with a tip-in \"Tip-in (basketball)\") with 1.2 seconds remaining. This was the first NBA Finals since 1995 in which a team won two straight road games to open the series; it was the first since 1993 in which the road team won the first three games.","score":0.6780931,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.reddit.com/r/nba/comments/1tsjv1q/the_nba_will_now_have_8_different_champions_in","title":"The NBA will now have 8 different champions in the last 8 ...","content":"The NBA will now have 8 different champions in the last 8 years. 2026 — San Antonio Spurs or New York Knicks 2025 — Oklahoma City Thunder 2024","score":0.6654328,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.threads.com/@nba/post/DZls2r8mqAy/for-the-first-time-in-league-history-there-have-been-different-nba-champions-in?hl=en","title":"For the first time in league history, there have been 8 ...","content":"The Knicks make it eight consecutive seasons without a repeat champion: 2026: Knicks 2025: Thunder 2024: Celtics 2023: Nuggets 2022: Warriors","score":0.5559422,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.marca.com/en/basketball/nba/2026/05/31/the-end-of-dynasties-nba-makes-history-with-eight-different-champions-in-eight-seasons.html","title":"The End of Dynasties: NBA makes history with eight ...","content":"For the eighth season, there will be a different champion in an NBA that had never seen such a wide array of winners.","score":0.54782754,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":2.78,"request_id":"af5fb6c6-514b-481d-82e0-13652154f238"}
